title: 5 easy ways to get more range out of your EV
summary: 五个实用技巧帮助电动汽车用户延长续航里程，减少充电频率。

title: Australia doubles the maximum penalty for its social media ban
summary: 澳大利亚将社交媒体禁令的最高罚款翻倍至9900万澳元（约6800万美元）。

title: Apple's touchscreen MacBook reportedly won't wait for the M7 chips
summary: 据Mark Gurman爆料，苹果首款触控屏MacBook将搭载M5 Pro/Max芯片提前发布，而非等待M7。

title: Mesh Wi-Fi or a range extender? Here's how to know which one you actually need
summary: 详细对比Mesh Wi-Fi系统与信号扩展器的优缺点，帮助用户选择适合的网络覆盖方案。

title: Flock cameras track more than your license plate, and they're spreading fast
summary: Flock监控摄像头不仅能追踪车牌，还引发越来越多的隐私和安全担忧，正在美国快速扩张。

title: Trump Administration Allows Anthropic to Release Mythos to Select US Organizations
summary: 美国政府放宽对Anthropic最先进AI模型Claude Mythos 5的限制，允许向100多家美国企业和政府机构开放访问。

title: China Defies US Restrictions and Builds the World's Fastest Supercomputer
summary: 中国深圳国家超级计算中心的LineShine超级计算机超越美国El Capitan，登顶TOP500榜首，全部采用国产CPU。

title: British Police Built a Sprawling Crime-Prediction Machine. Some Results Couldn't Be Trusted
summary: WIRED调查揭示英国布里斯托警方利用AI预测犯罪的大规模系统，涉及近50万人数据，部分模型结果存疑。

title: The Pentagon Is Looking Into the Dialog Data Exposure for Unmasking National Security Officials
summary: Peter Thiel旗下私人社交团体Dialog的数据泄露事件暴露了多名美国国家安全官员个人信息，五角大楼已介入调查。

title: AI researchers continue to leave Google for its rivals
summary: 谷歌顶尖AI研究员Jonas Adler和Alexander Pritzel加盟Anthropic，此前Noam Shazeer和John Jumper也已离职，人才流失趋势加剧。

title: Companies are scrambling to stop employees from maxing out AI budgets with small tasks
summary: 企业正从鼓励员工大量使用AI的'tokenmaxxing'时代转向限制AI支出的'token rationing'时代，Accenture等公司已开始严控AI使用成本。
